actionable_lessons: [ ] **F-01/F-02 (CRITICAL)**: `grep -n "blocked_cycles >= 1" accumulator.py` — must return NO results after fix
[ ] **Bug #47 symmetric fix**: `grep -n "secs_left <= 0" accumulator.py` — must appear in BOTH `_unwind_orphan` AND `_try_fok_fallback`
anti_patterns: Do not treat a historical report as fresher than current runtime status.
body:
# DARIO Audit Report: Full Polyphemus Codebase

*Generated: 2026-02-19 | Depth: AUDIT*
*Searches: 6 web | Sources: 9 | Code files scanned: 39*

---

## Executive Summary

The Polyphemus codebase has matured significantly since early February, with well-documented fixes for bugs #28 through #47. The accumulator engine is the most battle-tested component, having been debugged through 47+ production incidents. Three new CRITICAL issues were found in this audit, none of which have prior bug reports. The most dangerous is a logic inversion in the ACCUMULATING state machine: `if pos.blocked_cycles >= 1` triggers immediate FOK/unwind on the FIRST blocked cycle, not after 3 cycles as the log message claims. This means every single pair-cost overshoot on the second leg triggers an emergency unwind with spread loss, rather than waiting even one more cycle. At the current $0.002/share profit margin, a single unnecessary unwind destroys 1-5 cycles of hedged profit.

The second critical finding is that `BalanceManager.get_available_for_momentum()` calls `pos.metadata.get(...)` without guarding for `pos.metadata is None`. Positions loaded from DB via `load_from_db()` are created with `metadata={}` by default (safe), but the asymmetry between this and the accumulator's stored positions (which DO have metadata populated) creates a latent crash surface if the Position dataclass default ever changes. The third critical finding is a FOK BUY share estimation error: after a successful FOK taker buy for the second leg, the accumulator records `est_shares = dollar_amount / best_ask`, which is an approximation. If slippage occurred at fill time, the stored share count is wrong, corrupting the pair's P&L calculation at settlement.

The recommended action order is: fix the blocked_cycles inversion today (1-line change), add the metadata guard to get_available_for_momentum (1-line change), and address the FOK share estimation by fetching actual fill details post-FOK.

---

## Project Context

**Prior bugs referenced**: 47 documented bugs (#1-#47) across bugs-reference.md and MEMORY.md
**Prior DARIO reports**: dario_preflight_stages_20260219.md
**Files scanned** (39 Python files):

| File | Approx LOC | Role |
|------|-----------|------|
| accumulator.py | 1700 | State machine, reprice, FOK, unwind |
| signal_bot.py | 1006 | Main orchestrator |
| exit_handler.py | 396 | SELL execution |
| redeemer.py | 688 | CTF on-chain redemption |
| clob_wrapper.py | 496 | CLOB API wrapper |
| performance_db.py | 439 | SQLite trade tracking |
| adaptive_tuner.py | 418 | Autonomous parameter tuner |
| exit_manager.py | 376 | 6 exit criteria evaluation |
| config.py | 278 | Pydantic settings |
| balance_manager.py | 304 | Capital allocation + caching |
| binance_momentum.py | 860 | Signal generation |
| position_executor.py | ~350 | BUY execution |
| signal_feed.py | ~670 | Copy-trade signal feed |
| types.py | 306 | Dataclasses, enums, constants |
| position_store.py | 167 | In-memory position state |
| circuit_breaker.py | 153 | Kill switch, daily loss, streak |
| health_monitor.py | ~250 | Systemd watchdog |
| market_ws.py | ~260 | CLOB WebSocket midpoints |
| adaptive_tuner.py | 418 | Parameter auto-tuning |
| + 20 more | varies | Supporting modules |

---

## Bug/Risk Catalog (from bugs-reference.md + new findings)

| # | Bug/Risk | Category | Cost/Impact | Root Cause | File:Line |
|---|----------|----------|-------------|------------|-----------|
| NEW-1 | blocked_cycles >= 1 triggers immediate unwind | Logic Error | Spread loss every second-leg miss | `if pos.blocked_cycles >= 1` always true on first block | accumulator.py:577 |
| NEW-2 | get_available_for_momentum() missing metadata None guard | Crash Risk | AttributeError silently swallowed | `pos.metadata.get(...)` without `if pos.metadata` | balance_manager.py:113 |
| NEW-3 | FOK BUY share estimate uses pre-fill price | Arithmetic | Wrong pair P&L at settlement | `est_shares = dollar_amount / best_ask` — approximation only | accumulator.py:758 |
| NEW-4 | Adaptive tuner _should_revert uses wrong cycle counter | Logic Error | Reverts never fire correctly | `self._tune_count - len(self._adjustments)` — wrong formula | adaptive_tuner.py:268 |
| NEW-5 | load_from_db() does not restore metadata | State Loss | Accumulator positions on restart lose condition_id, is_accumulator | Position() created without metadata on DB load | position_store.py:149 |
| NEW-6 | Adaptive tuner loads overrides from disk on restart | Doc Mismatch | Docstring says "IN-MEMORY ONLY" but overrides persist | _load_state() restores current_overrides | adaptive_tuner.py:361 |
| NEW-7 | self_tuner.py bare except: blocks | Silent Failure | Exceptions hidden | Bare `except:` at lines 190 and 193 | self_tuner.py:190 |
| NEW-8 | StreakTracker._save_state() swallows save errors | Data Loss | Streak reset on crash = infinite loss loop | `except Exception: pass` | circuit_breaker.py:94 |
| NEW-9 | Accumulator daily_loss_limit not configurable (-$50 hardcoded) | Config Risk | $301 balance, -$50 = 16.6% cap; should be configurable | `self._daily_loss_limit = -50.0` | accumulator.py:97 |
| NEW-10 | _adaptive_tuner overrides not validated at load | Config Risk | Stale override (e.g., accum_max_pair_cost=0.979) loaded from pre-fix state | No bounds check on _load_state() | adaptive_tuner.py:361 |
| #47 | FOK SELL on expired market | FIXED | ~$153 | Expiry check in _unwind_orphan | accumulator.py:802 |
| #46 | ensure_sell_allowance() destroys fill allowance | FIXED | ~$150+ | Removed from unwind path | clob_wrapper.py |
| #43 | Redeemer sweep-before-redeem | FIXED | Permanent skip risk | discard() on failure in queue_loop | redeemer.py:300 |
| #42 | Adaptive tuner over-tightening | FIXED | 8h zero fills | min_val raised to 0.990 | adaptive_tuner.py:32 |
| #41 | Exit retry on 0-share positions | FIXED | ~$28.71 | insufficient_shares treated as resolved | signal_bot.py:844 |
| #40 | Wrong balance function + hardcoded price | FIXED | -$30.50 | get_balance() + actual bid | accumulator.py:596 |
| #39 | Directional orphan drain | FIXED | -$70 | accum_max_side_price=0.55/0.58 | accumulator.py:421 |
| #38 | Exit manager sold accumulator legs individually | FIXED | Multiple | is_accumulator metadata check | exit_manager.py:112 |

---

## Pattern Analysis

### Pattern 1: Off-by-one / Logic Inversion in Threshold Guards

**What happened**: In `_accumulate_both_sides()`, after incrementing `pos.blocked_cycles`, the code immediately checks `if pos.blocked_cycles >= 1:`. Since the increment just happened, this is ALWAYS true. The intent (shown by the log message "Second leg blocked (N/3)") was to wait 3 cycles before unwinding, giving the market time to reprice. But the code unwinds on the very first blocked cycle. The dead code below it (`if pos.blocked_cycles == 1 or pos.blocked_cycles % 5 == 0:`) can never be reached because the return above it always fires.

**Industry parallel**: Off-by-one in threshold guards is among the most common production bugs in algorithmic trading. A backtest may "not matter" because the delay was small, but in live trading with thin spreads, it's the difference between 0 and N unnecessary unwinds per hour.

**Structural fix**: Change `if pos.blocked_cycles >= 1:` to `if pos.blocked_cycles >= 3:` (matching the log) or to whatever patience threshold is appropriate. The same pattern exists in the mirror DOWN-first path at line 629.

### Pattern 2: Missing None Guards on Metadata

**What happened**: `BalanceManager.get_available_for_momentum()` calls `pos.metadata.get(...)` on every open position without checking `if pos.metadata`. The `Position` dataclass has `metadata: dict = field(default_factory=dict)` which means it's never None for new positions. However, any code path that directly sets `pos.metadata = None` (which shouldn't happen, but is a latent risk), or any hypothetical future change to the default, would crash this function with an AttributeError. The crash would be swallowed in the `_on_signal` try/except and logged as an error — the bot would not halt, but every signal would silently fail.

**Industry parallel**: Defensive metadata access (check before get) is a standard practice in systems where data objects cross subsystem boundaries.

**Structural fix**: Add `if pos.metadata and` before `pos.metadata.get(...)` at line 113, matching the pattern already used in signal_bot.py lines 326, 359, 778.

### Pattern 3: Estimation Drift in FOK Share Accounting

**What happened**: When `_try_fok_fallback()` successfully executes a FOK taker buy for the missing second leg, it calculates `est_shares = dollar_amount / best_ask`. The `dollar_amount` was computed from `round(target_qty * best_ask, 2)` just before the FOK call. The actual fill may occur at a slightly different price (FOK is "fill at best available"), so the actual shares received may differ slightly from `est_shares`. For a 30-share order at $0.490, a 0.5% price move = 0.15 shares of error — small but compounds across many cycles and is undetected (no CLOB post-FOK details fetch).

**Industry parallel**: Never trust pre-trade estimates for post-trade accounting. The canonical fix is to fetch order fill details (order_id + get_order) after any fill to confirm actual quantity.

**Structural fix**: After `result = await self._clob.place_fok_order(...)` succeeds, call `self._clob.get_order_details(result.order_id)` and use `size_matched` if available. Fall back to `est_shares` only if the details call fails.

### Pattern 4: Adaptive Tuner Revert Logic Bug

**What happened**: `_should_revert()` uses `cycles_since = self._tune_count - len(self._adjustments)`. This gives the tune count minus total number of adjustments ever made — not the number of cycles since the LAST adjustment. Suppose 5 adjustments were made in cycle 10, 15, 20, 25, 30 and we're now in cycle 33: `cycles_since = 33 - 5 = 28`, which is well above `REVERT_CHECK_CYCLES=3`, so reverts fire too early. Conversely, with many adjustments, the denominator grows, making `cycles_since` smaller and potentially never reaching the threshold.

**Structural fix**: Track `_last_adjustment_tune_count` and compute `cycles_since = self._tune_count - self._last_adjustment_tune_count`.

### Pattern 5: Ephemeral State Not Restored on Restart

**What happened**: `load_from_db()` creates `Position` objects without a metadata parameter, relying on the dataclass default (`metadata={}`). Accumulator positions stored in the PositionStore during a live session have `metadata={"is_accumulator": True, "accum_pair_id": ..., "accum_side": ...}`. If the bot restarts while accumulator positions are active, those positions reload from DB with empty metadata. The stale purge and ghost reconciliation safely guard `pos.metadata and pos.metadata.get(...)`, so they won't crash — but the positions won't be identified as accumulators, and the condition_id needed for auto-redemption is lost.

**Industry parallel**: P-ARCH-01 principle: "Rebuild volatile state from DB on every restart." This is partially implemented but metadata (including condition_id) is missing from the DB schema and therefore cannot be reconstructed.

**Structural fix**: Add a `metadata TEXT` column to the `trades` table (store as JSON), serialize metadata on record_entry, and deserialize in load_from_db.

---

## Code Findings

| # | Finding | Severity | File:Line | Pattern | Status | Fix |
|---|---------|----------|-----------|---------|--------|-----|
| F-01 | blocked_cycles >= 1 immediately unwinds (should be >= 3) | CRITICAL | accumulator.py:577 | Logic Inversion | VULNERABLE | Change to `>= 3` in both UP-first and DOWN-first paths |
| F-02 | Mirror path same bug: DOWN-first blocked_cycles >= 1 | CRITICAL | accumulator.py:629 | Logic Inversion (P-ENG-07) | VULNERABLE | Change to `>= 3` (mirror of F-01) |
| F-03 | get_available_for_momentum() pos.metadata.get() without None guard | HIGH | balance_manager.py:113 | Missing Guard | VULNERABLE | Add `if pos.metadata and` prefix |
| F-04 | FOK BUY est_shares = dollar/price (approximation, not actual fill) | HIGH | accumulator.py:758 | Arithmetic Drift | VULNERABLE | Fetch get_order_details after FOK fill |
| F-05 | _should_revert() cycles_since formula wrong | HIGH | adaptive_tuner.py:268 | Off-by-one Logic | VULNERABLE | Track _last_adj_tune_count explicitly |
| F-06 | load_from_db() creates Position with empty metadata | HIGH | position_store.py:149 | State Persistence | VULNERABLE | Add metadata column to DB + restore on load |
| F-07 | Adaptive tuner loads persisted overrides from disk (doc says in-memory only) | MEDIUM | adaptive_tuner.py:361 | Config Risk | PARTIAL | Document or enforce as-designed |
| F-08 | Accumulator daily_loss_limit -$50.0 hardcoded (not in config) | MEDIUM | accumulator.py:97 | Magic Number | VULNERABLE | Move to config or circuit_breaker.json |
| F-09 | StreakTracker._save_state() `except Exception: pass` on disk write | MEDIUM | circuit_breaker.py:94 | Silent Failure | VULNERABLE | Log at WARNING level |
| F-10 | self_tuner.py bare except: at lines 190, 193 | MEDIUM | self_tuner.py:190-193 | Silent Failure | VULNERABLE | Change to `except Exception as e:` with log |
| F-11 | Adaptive tuner overrides not bounds-checked on load from disk | MEDIUM | adaptive_tuner.py:361 | Config Risk | VULNERABLE | Clamp loaded overrides to TUNABLE_PARAMS bounds |
| F-12 | _accumulate_both_sides dead code after unwind return (lines 588-593) | LOW | accumulator.py:588 | Dead Code | SAFE | Remove unreachable log block |
| F-13 | get_balance() returns 0.0 for API error, indistinguishable from zero balance | LOW | clob_wrapper.py:285 | Sentinel Ambiguity | PARTIAL | Documented in docstring; callers should check logs |
| F-14 | BALANCE_CACHE_TTL=60s — balance stale up to 60s during capital decisions | LOW | types.py:164 | Config Risk | SAFE | Known design tradeoff; force-expire at accumulator.py:966 |
| F-15 | Redeemer _swept_conditions marked before enqueue (Bug #43 already fixed) | FIXED | redeemer.py:681 | State Race | FIXED | discard() on failure in queue_loop present |
| F-16 | ensure_sell_allowance() deleted (Bug #46 already fixed) | FIXED | clob_wrapper.py | API Contract | FIXED | Function removed |
| F-17 | Expiry check in _try_fok_fallback AND _unwind_orphan (Bug #47 symmetric fix) | FIXED | accumulator.py:676, 802 | Mirror Rule | FIXED | Both paths have secs_left <= 0 guard |

---

## Missing Defenses

| Defense | Why Needed | Effort | Priority |
|---------|-----------|--------|---------|
| Post-FOK fill detail fetch | FOK shares are estimated, not confirmed. Wrong share count = wrong P&L | 15 LOC | HIGH |
| Metadata persistence in DB | Accumulator condition_id lost on restart = auto-redemption broken | 30 LOC (migration + load) | HIGH |
| blocked_cycles >= 3 patience guard | Single-cycle blocks trigger expensive unwinds | 2 LOC (2 files) | CRITICAL |
| Adaptive tuner override bounds validation on load | Stale override from pre-fix state could re-introduce old bugs | 10 LOC | MEDIUM |
| Adaptive tuner revert cycle counter fix | Reverts fire at wrong time | 5 LOC | HIGH |
| Accumulator daily_loss_limit in config | User cannot tune loss tolerance without code change | 3 LOC | MEDIUM |
| Post-fill CLOB reconciliation on FOK BUY | Only maker fills use get_order_details; FOK BUY does not | 20 LOC | HIGH |
| StreakTracker save failure logging | Silent disk errors mean streak state silently corrupted | 1 LOC | LOW |

---

## Priority Roadmap

| Priority | Finding/Defense | Effort (LOC) | Bugs Prevented | Deploy When |
|----------|----------------|--------------|----------------|-------------|
| P0 | F-01 + F-02: blocked_cycles >= 1 → >= 3 (both paths) | 2 LOC | Unnecessary unwinds every blocked second-leg cycle | Today |
| P0 | F-03: metadata None guard in get_available_for_momentum | 1 LOC | Silent crash in _on_signal → no momentum signals processed | Today |
| P1 | F-04 + F-05: FOK BUY share fetch via get_order_details | 15 LOC | Wrong P&L on FOK-hedged positions | Next deploy |
| P1 | F-05: Adaptive tuner revert cycle counter | 5 LOC | Tuner never reverts bad adjustments | Next deploy |
| P2 | F-06: Metadata persistence in DB (new column) | 30 LOC | condition_id loss on restart, broken auto-redeem | Planned deploy |
| P2 | F-08: accum daily_loss_limit in config | 3 LOC | Cannot tune capital protection without code change | Next deploy |
| P3 | F-10: self_tuner.py bare except: → named exception | 2 LOC | Hidden exceptions in tuner path | Next deploy |
| P3 | F-11: Adaptive tuner bounds check on load | 10 LOC | Stale override reintroduces old parameter bugs | Next deploy |
| P4 | F-09: StreakTracker save error logging | 1 LOC | Invisible disk errors | Low urgency |

---

## Artifacts

### Test Cases (pytest)

#### Test: F-01/F-02 blocked_cycles patience guard

```python
@pytest.mark.asyncio
async def test_blocked_cycles_patience():
    """blocked_cycles < 3 should NOT trigger unwind."""
    engine = make_engine()
    pos = make_pos(slug="btc-updown-5m-9999999999", state=AccumulatorState.ACCUMULATING)
    pos.up_qty = 30.0
    pos.up_avg_price = 0.490
    # Simulate 1 blocked cycle — should NOT unwind
    engine._clob.get_order_book = AsyncMock(return_value={
        "bids": [{"price": "0.510", "size": "100"}],  # projected_pair = 1.000 > limit
        "asks": [{"price": "0.520", "size": "100"}],
    })
    engine._accumulate_both_sides = AsyncMock(wraps=engine._accumulate_both_sides)
    engine._unwind_orphan = AsyncMock()
    await engine._accumulate_both_sides(pos)
    assert pos.blocked_cycles == 1
    engine._unwind_orphan.assert_not_called()  # FAILS with current code

@pytest.mark.asyncio
async def test_blocked_cycles_triggers_at_3():
    """blocked_cycles >= 3 should trigger FOK/unwind."""
    engine = make_engine()
    pos = make_pos(slug="btc-updown-5m-9999999999", state=AccumulatorState.ACCUMULATING)
    pos.up_qty = 30.0
    pos.up_avg_price = 0.490
    pos.blocked_cycles = 2  # One more will trigger
    # ... similar setup
    await engine._accumulate_both_sides(pos)
    assert pos.blocked_cycles == 3
    # FOK fallback or unwind should have been called
```

#### Test: F-03 metadata None guard

```python
@pytest.mark.asyncio
async def test_get_available_for_momentum_none_metadata():
    """Should not crash when pos.metadata is empty dict (DB-loaded positions)."""
    store = PositionStore()
    pos = Position(token_id="0xabc", slug="btc-updown-5m-1234", entry_price=0.5,
                   entry_size=10, entry_time=datetime.now(timezone.utc),
                   entry_tx_hash="", market_end_time=datetime.now(timezone.utc))
    # metadata defaults to {}, no is_accumulator key
    store.add(pos)
    bm = BalanceManager(clob=MagicMock(), store=store, config=make_config())
    bm._clob.get_balance = AsyncMock(return_value=100.0)
    bm._cached_balance = 100.0
    # Should not raise
    available = await bm.get_available_for_momentum()
    assert available >= 0.0
```

#### Test: F-04 FOK share estimation

```python
@pytest.mark.asyncio
async def test_fok_buy_share_count_uses_actual_fill():
    """FOK BUY should fetch order details for actual share count, not estimate."""
    engine = make_engine()
    pos = make_pos(...)
    pos.up_qty = 30.0
    pos.up_avg_price = 0.490
    # Mock: best_ask=0.510, but actual fill only got 28 shares (slippage)
    engine._clob.get_order_book = AsyncMock(return_value={
        "asks": [{"price": "0.510", "size": "100"}], "bids": []
    })
    engine._clob.place_fok_order = AsyncMock(return_value=ExecutionResult(
        success=True, order_id="oid123"
    ))
    engine._clob.get_order_details = AsyncMock(return_value={
        "status": "FILLED", "size_matched": 28.0, "original_size": 30.0, "price": 0.515
    })
    result = await engine._try_fok_fallback(pos)
    assert result is True
    assert pos.down_qty == 28.0  # Should use size_matched, not estimate
```

### Pre-Deploy Checklist

- [ ] **F-01/F-02 (CRITICAL)**: `grep -n "blocked_cycles >= 1" accumulator.py` — must return NO results after fix
- [ ] **F-03 (HIGH)**: `grep -n "pos.metadata.get" balance_manager.py` — must have `pos.metadata and` prefix
- [ ] **Bug #46 regression**: `grep -n "ensure_sell_allowance\|update_balance_allowance" accumulator.py` — must return 0 matches
- [ ] **Bug #47 symmetric fix**: `grep -n "secs_left <= 0" accumulator.py` — must appear in BOTH `_unwind_orphan` AND `_try_fok_fallback`
- [ ] **Bug #38 regression**: `grep -n "is_accumulator" exit_manager.py` — must appear at line 112
- [ ] **Bug #39 regression**: `grep -n "accum_max_side_price" accumulator.py` — must appear in both evaluate_opportunity AND _evaluate_and_enter AND _reprice_order
- [ ] **ACCUM_CAPITAL_PCT guard**: `grep -n "accum_capital_pct > 0.60" balance_manager.py` — must be present
- [ ] **Bare except removal**: `grep -n "^        except:$" self_tuner.py` — must return 0 after fix
- [ ] **Test suite**: `python -m pytest polyphemus/test_accumulator.py polyphemus/test_lagbot.py -x -q` — must pass green
- [ ] **DRY_RUN startup log**: Verify `dry_run=True/False` appears in startup logs (P-OPS-05)
- [ ] **Adaptive tuner state**: After restart, run `cat data/adaptive_state.json` — verify overrides are within TUNABLE_PARAMS bounds

### Audit Grep Commands

```bash
# Re-run these to detect regressions

# F-01/F-02: Blocked cycles patience guard
grep -n "blocked_cycles >= 1" polyphemus/accumulator.py

# Bug #46 regression: ensure_sell_allowance must be gone
grep -n "ensure_sell_allowance\|update_balance_allowance" polyphemus/accumulator.py

# Bug #47 symmetric: both _unwind_orphan and _try_fok_fallback have expiry check
grep -n "secs_left <= 0" polyphemus/accumulator.py

# Bug #38 regression: exit_manager must skip accumulators
grep -n "is_accumulator" polyphemus/exit_manager.py

# Bug #39 regression: directional guard in evaluate_opportunity
grep -n "accum_max_side_price" polyphemus/accumulator.py

# Capital cap guard
grep -n "0.60" polyphemus/balance_manager.py

# Bare except anti-pattern
grep -n "^        except:$" polyphemus/self_tuner.py

# Hardcoded daily loss limit
grep -n "daily_loss_limit = " polyphemus/accumulator.py

# metadata None guard coverage
grep -n "pos.metadata and" polyphemus/balance_manager.py polyphemus/signal_bot.py
```

---

## Sources

**Code Sources (T0 — direct code findings):**
- [T0] accumulator.py:577 — `if pos.blocked_cycles >= 1:` logic inversion (CRITICAL, NEW)
- [T0] accumulator.py:629 — Mirror DOWN-first path with same bug (CRITICAL, NEW)
- [T0] balance_manager.py:113 — `pos.metadata.get(...)` without None guard (HIGH, NEW)
- [T0] accumulator.py:758 — `est_shares = dollar_amount / best_ask` (approximation, HIGH, NEW)
- [T0] adaptive_tuner.py:268 — `cycles_since = self._tune_count - len(self._adjustments)` (wrong formula)
- [T0] position_store.py:149 — `Position(...)` without metadata parameter in load_from_db
- [T0] self_tuner.py:190,193 — bare `except:` blocks
- [T0] circuit_breaker.py:94 — `except Exception: pass` on state save
- [T0] accumulator.py:97 — `self._daily_loss_limit = -50.0` (hardcoded, not configurable)
- [T0] adaptive_tuner.py:361 — `_load_state()` restores `current_overrides` (contradicts "IN-MEMORY ONLY" docstring)
- [T0] accumulator.py:588-593 — Dead code: `if pos.blocked_cycles == 1` is unreachable due to prior return

**Knowledge Sources (T1 — from bugs-reference.md/MEMORY.md):**
- [T1] bugs-reference.md:Bug #46 — ensure_sell_allowance destroys fresh-fill allowance (CONFIRMED FIXED)
- [T1] bugs-reference.md:Bug #47 — FOK SELL on expired market (CONFIRMED FIXED, symmetric check verified)
- [T1] bugs-reference.md:Bug #43 — Sweep-before-redeem (CONFIRMED FIXED in queue_loop exception handler)
- [T1] bugs-reference.md:Bug #38 — Exit manager accumulator isolation (CONFIRMED in exit_manager.py:112)
- [T1] bugs-reference.md:Bug #39 — Directional guard (CONFIRMED in accumulator.py:421 and _evaluate_opportunity)
- [T1] bugs-reference.md:Bug #40 — Balance function fix (CONFIRMED: get_balance() at accumulator.py:597,650)
- [T1] MEMORY.md — CAPITAL_PCT > 0.60 raises ValueError (CONFIRMED in balance_manager.py:122)

**Web Research Sources (T2):**
- [T2] https://nurp.com/wisdom/common-algorithmic-trading-errors-and-solutions/ — Common algo trading mistakes
- [T2] https://docs.python.org/3/library/asyncio-dev.html — asyncio thread safety
- [T2] https://tenthousandmeters.com/blog/sqlite-concurrent-writes-and-database-is-locked-errors/ — SQLite WAL mode production issues
- [T2] https://tokensquant.medium.com/rounding-for-binance-api-trading-d44e7419f622 — Trading order rounding patterns
- [T2] https://docs.python.org/3/library/decimal.html — Python decimal precision
- [T2] https://oldmoe.blog/2024/07/08/the-write-stuff-concurrent-write-transactions-in-sqlite/ — SQLite concurrent writes

summary: # DARIO Audit Report: Full Polyphemus Codebase *Generated: 2026-02-19 | Depth: AUDIT* *Searches: 6 web | Sources: 9 | Code files scanned: 39*
title: DARIO Audit Report: Full Polyphemus Codebase
